# Teamz Lab Tools

> 901+ free, private, browser-based tools and calculators. No login, no data collection, no server processing. Built by Teamz Lab.

- Website: https://tool.teamzlab.com
- Sitemap: https://tool.teamzlab.com/sitemap.xml
- Full tool index: https://tool.teamzlab.com/llms-full.txt
- Contact: hello@teamzlab.com

## 3D Tools
- [3D Model Viewer — View STL, OBJ, GLTF Files Online Free](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/stl-viewer/): View STL, OBJ, GLTF, and GLB 3D models in your browser for free
- [3D Print Time Estimator — How Long Will My Print Take?](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/print-time-estimator/): Estimate 3D print duration from model dimensions and slicer settings
- [3D Printing Cost Calculator — Estimate Print Price](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/printing-cost-calculator/): Calculate 3D printing cost including material, electricity, depreciation, and labor
- [3D Product Mockup Generator — Free Box Mockup Tool](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/product-mockup-generator/): Generate 3D product box mockups instantly
- [3D Text Generator — Free Online 3D Typography Tool](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/text-generator/): Generate stunning 3D text online for free
- [STL to OBJ Converter — Free Online 3D File Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/stl-to-obj-converter/): Convert STL to OBJ and OBJ to STL instantly in your browser

## AI Tools
- [AI Cover Letter Helper](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/cover-letter-helper/): Generate professional cover letters with browser-based AI
- [AI Headline Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/headline-generator/): Generate click-worthy headlines with browser-based AI
- [AI Prompt Cleaner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/prompt-cleaner/): Clean and optimize AI prompts with readability scores, vague word detection, structure analysis, and improvement suggestions
- [AI Quote Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/ai-quote-generator/): Generate beautiful quotes with AI or browse 500+ curated quotes
- [AI Resume Summary Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/resume-summary-generator/): Generate a professional resume summary using browser-based AI
- [AI Text Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/article-summarizer/): Summarize any text free with AI running in your browser
- [Email Improver](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/email-improver/): Improve your email drafts with Chrome's built-in AI
- [Grammar Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/grammar-checker/): Check grammar, spelling, and punctuation with browser-based AI
- [Interview Question Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/interview-question-generator/): Generate tailored interview questions with browser-based AI
- [Job Description Extractor](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/job-description-extractor/): Extract skills, experience level, salary range, and location from job descriptions using Chrome's built-in AI
- [Language Detector](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/language-detector/): Detect the language of any text with confidence scores using Chrome's built-in Language Detector API
- [Meeting Notes Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/meeting-notes-summarizer/): Summarize meeting notes and extract action items using browser-based AI
- [Payslip Explainer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/payslip-explainer/): Understand your payslip with browser-based AI
- [Plain English Rewriter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/plain-english-rewriter/): Rewrite complex, legal, or technical text in plain English using browser-based AI
- [Private Contract Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/contract-summarizer/): Summarize contracts and legal documents privately using browser-based AI
- [Proposal Rewriter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/proposal-rewriter/): Rewrite freelance proposals more professionally using browser-based AI
- [Synonym Finder](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/synonym-finder/): Find synonyms for any word using Chrome's built-in AI
- [Text to Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/text-to-checklist/): Convert paragraph text into a bulleted checklist using browser-based AI
- [Tone Switcher](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/tone-switcher/): Switch text between formal, casual, and friendly tones using Chrome's built-in AI

## Automotive
- [Car Depreciation Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/car-depreciation-calculator/): Calculate how much your car depreciates over time

- [Car Loan Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/car-loan-calculator/): Calculate your monthly car loan payment, total interest paid, and total cost
- [EV Charging Cost Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/ev-charging-cost/): Calculate the cost to charge your electric car at home or public stations
- [EV Range Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/ev-range-calculator/): Estimate your electric car's real-world range based on battery capacity, charge level, temperature, and driving conditions
- [EV vs Petrol Cost Comparison Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/ev-vs-petrol-cost/): Compare the annual running costs of an electric car vs a petrol car
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/fuel-cost-calculator/): Calculate exactly how much fuel your trip will cost
- [MPG to L/100km Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/mpg-to-l100km-converter/): Convert between MPG (US), MPG (UK), L/100km, and km/L instantly
- [Road Trip Cost Planner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/road-trip-cost-planner/): Plan your road trip budget with this all-in-one cost calculator
- [Tire Pressure Guide](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/tire-pressure-checker/): Find recommended tire pressure for your vehicle

- [Course Pricing Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/creator/course-pricing-calculator/): Calculate optimal online course pricing based on creation investment, target students, platform fees, and value-add features
- [Creator Income Goal Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/creator/creator-income-goal-calculator/): Plan your monthly creator income from sponsorships, digital products, affiliates, and other revenue streams
- [Digital Product Pricing Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/creator/digital-product-pricing-calculator/): Calculate optimal pricing for digital products like ebooks, templates, courses, and presets

- [UGC Rate Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/creator/ugc-rate-calculator/): Calculate fair UGC creator rates based on deliverables, usage rights, exclusivity, and experience level

- [Cricket Player Age Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/cricket-age-calculator/): Calculate exact cricket player age on match day in years, months, and days
- [Cricket Run Rate Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/run-rate-calculator/): Calculate cricket run rate, required run rate, projected score, and chase difficulty for IPL, T20, ODI, Test, and all formats
- [Cricket Strike Rate Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/strike-rate-calculator/): Calculate batting and bowling strike rate in cricket
- [Cricket Wagon Wheel Maker 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/wagon-wheel-plotter/): Free cricket wagon wheel plotter
- [DLS Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/dls-calculator/): Free DLS calculator for rain-affected cricket matches
- [First Innings Target Score Predictor](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/target-score-calculator/): Predict first innings target score based on powerplay performance, wickets, and venue
- [IPL Auction Budget Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/ipl-auction-budget-calculator/): Free IPL auction budget calculator
- [Net Run Rate (NRR) Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/cricket/net-run-rate-calculator/): Calculate net run rate (NRR) for cricket tournament standings

- [Chmod Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dev/chmod-calculator/): Calculate Linux file permissions instantly — convert between octal (755) and symbolic (rwxr-xr-x) notation with a visual permission grid

## Diagnostic Tools
- [Background Color Detector 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/background-color-detector/): Free webcam background color detector for video calls
- [Battery Status Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/battery-status-checker/): Free online battery status checker
- [Browser Fingerprint Test](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/browser-fingerprint-checker/): Check how unique your browser fingerprint is
- [DNS Leak Test](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/dns-leak-test/): Free online DNS leak test
- [Device &amp; Browser Info Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/device-info-checker/): Discover what your browser reveals about your device
- [Free DNS Lookup](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/dns-lookup/): Free DNS lookup tool
- [Free Online Metronome](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/metronome/): Free online metronome with adjustable BPM, time signatures, and accent options
- [Free Online Passport Photo Maker 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/passport-photo-maker/): Free online passport photo maker with webcam capture
- [Free Online Photo Booth 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/photo-booth/): Free online photo booth with webcam timer, flash effect, and classic photo strip mode
- [Free Online Tone Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/tone-generator/): Free online tone generator — play sine, square, sawtooth, and triangle waves at any frequency from 20Hz to 20kHz
- [Free QR Code Scanner Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/qr-code-scanner/): Scan QR codes instantly with your device camera
- [Free Sound Level Meter Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/diagnostic/sound-level-meter/): Free online sound level meter to measure ambient noise in decibels

- [Logarithm Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/logarithm-calculator/): Calculate logarithms in any base — log, ln, log2, and custom bases with change-of-base formula
- [Matrix Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/matrix-calculator/): Perform matrix addition, subtraction, multiplication, transpose, determinant, and inverse with step-by-step solutions

- [Number Line Visualizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/number-line/): Visualize numbers and arithmetic on an interactive number line
- [Number to Words Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/number-to-words/): Convert numbers to words instantly
- [Percentage Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/percentage-calculator/): Calculate percentages instantly — find X% of Y, percentage change, and percentage difference
- [Permutation &amp; Combination Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/permutation-combination-calculator/): Calculate permutations and combinations instantly with step-by-step factorial breakdowns
- [Pie Chart Maker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/pie-chart-maker/): Create beautiful pie and donut charts instantly
- [Prime Number Checker &amp; Factorizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/prime-number-checker/): Check if any number is prime and get its full prime factorization tree
- [Probability Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/probability-calculator/): Calculate event probabilities, conditional probability, complements, and odds with step-by-step formulas
- [Quadratic Equation Solver](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/quadratic-equation-solver/): Solve any quadratic equation ax²+bx+c=0 with step-by-step working
- [Ratio Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/ratio-calculator/): Simplify ratios, scale to a target total, and solve proportions
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/roman-numeral-converter/): Convert numbers to Roman numerals and Roman numerals to numbers instantly
- [Square Root Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/square-root-calculator/): Calculate square roots, simplify radicals, and find cube roots with step-by-step working
- [Standard Deviation Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/standard-deviation-calculator/): Calculate population and sample standard deviation, variance, and mean
- [Unit Circle Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/math/unit-circle-calculator/): Find sin, cos, tan, csc, sec, cot values for any angle with exact results, reference angles, and quadrant info
